hero.title: Practical Support for Real Life.
hero.subtitle: Helping individuals and families apply therapeutic skills to everyday life with confidence and care.

about.title: Meet Gigi
paragraphs: Virginia (Gigi) Dubois is a Registered Social Service Worker based in Canada, dedicated to supporting individuals, families, and caregivers through life's challenges.
Her approach focuses on applying clinical tools to real-world situations — making therapeutic skills practical, accessible, and empowering for everyday life.
Gigi works collaboratively with Occupational and Physical Therapists to ensure cohesive, comprehensive care that puts families at the center.

services.title: How I Can Help
services.subtitle: Flexible, personalized services designed to meet you where you are.

items.title: 1:1 Social Support
items.description: Personalized sessions tailored to individual needs, helping you build confidence and skills at your own pace.

items.title: Group Classes
items.description: Skill-building sessions in a fun, flexible group environment. Register per session with flexible scheduling.

programs.title: Flexible & Engaging Group Programs
programs.description: Our group programs are designed to develop skills in a safe, encouraging environment where every participant's autonomy and voice are valued.
highlights: Skill development in a fun, creative setting
Safe and encouraging environment for all
Participant autonomy and choice always respected
expectations: Fun and engaging for all ages

philosophy.title: Empowerment Through Practical Skills
paragraphs: I believe in real, honest support. Every family deserves someone in their corner who listens without judgment and helps translate clinical goals into everyday wins.
Whether you're navigating special needs, healthcare systems, or simply looking for guidance — I'm here to help build independence and confidence, one step at a time.
philosophy.quote: Supportive, creative, and always centered on what matters most — your family.

items.q: What is a Registered Social Service Worker?
items.a: A Registered Social Service Worker (RSSW) is a regulated professional who provides support in areas like mental health, family services, and community resources. RSSWs are registered with a provincial regulatory body and uphold professional standards of practice.
Yes! I offer personalized 1:1 sessions tailored to your unique needs and goals. These sessions focus on building practical skills and strategies you can use in everyday life.

Group sessions are offered on a per-session registration basis, giving you the flexibility to attend when it works for your schedule. Simply reach out to learn about upcoming sessions and reserve your spot.

items.q: Do you collaborate with other healthcare providers?
items.a: Absolutely. I work closely with Occupational Therapists, Physical Therapists, and other professionals to ensure cohesive, well-rounded support for individuals and families.
